name: Hengdian Group Tospo Lighting Co., Ltd.
summary: Hengdian Group Tospo Lighting Co., Ltd. researches and develops, manufactures, and sells light source products, Indoor lightings, professional lightings, lighting control products, structural components, and engineering plastics. Its products include LED bulbs, spotlights, decorative lights, straight tubes and pipes, energy-saving lamps, LED indoor lighting products, panel lights, downlights, bracket lights, grille lights, intelligent lamps, street lamps, floodlights, mining lamps, wall lamps, security lamps, and other products. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Dongyang, China. Hengdian Group Tospo Lighting Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Hengdian Group Holdings Limited.
